001import java.util.HashMap;
002
003/**
004 * Models one location in the game world: narrative text, image, exits to other rooms,
005 * and a keyed collection of {@link Item}s the player can examine.
006 *
007 * @author Barnabe Jouanard
008 * @version 2026.02.17
009 */
010public class Room
011{
012    /** Short phrase used in descriptions, e.g. "in the kitchen". */
013    private String aDescription;
014    /** Maps direction names to neighboring {@link Room} instances. */
015    private HashMap<String, Room> aExits;
016    /** Classpath resource path for the optional room illustration. */
017    private String aImageName;
018    /** Items present in this room, keyed by a short lookup name. */
019    private ItemList aItems;
020    
021    /**
022     * Creates a room with a description, image path, and empty exit/item maps.
023     *
024     * @param pDescription human-readable location phrase shown to the player
025     * @param pImage       resource path for the picture, or {@code null} if none
026     */
027    public Room( final String pDescription, final String pImage )
028    {
029        this.aDescription = pDescription;
030        this.aExits = new HashMap<String, Room>();
031        this.aImageName = pImage;
032        this.aItems = new ItemList();
033    } // Room()
034
035    /**
036     * Composes the room description, exit list, and either item lines or a default notice.
037     *
038     * @return multi-line description suitable for printing or appending to the log
039     */
040    public String getLongDescription()
041    {
042        return "You are " + this.getDescription() + ".\n" + this.getExitString() + "\n\n" + this.aItems.getItemsDescription();
043    } // getLongDescription()
044
045    /**
046     * Returns the short description supplied at construction time.
047     *
048     * @return the base location phrase
049     */
050    public String getDescription()
051    {
052        return this.aDescription;
053    } // getDescription()
054
055    /**
056     * Looks up the neighboring room reachable via {@code pDirection}.
057     *
058     * @param pDirection exit key such as {@code "north"} or {@code "up"}
059     * @return the linked {@link Room}, or {@code null} if no exit exists
060     */
061    public Room getExit( final String pDirection )
062    {
063        return this.aExits.get( pDirection );
064    } // getExit()
065
066    /**
067     * Registers a one-way exit from this room to {@code pExit}.
068     *
069     * @param pDirection compass or vertical direction used by the parser
070     * @param pExit      destination room; may be {@code null} to remove an exit
071     */
072    public void setExit( final String pDirection, final Room pExit )
073    {
074        this.aExits.put( pDirection, pExit );
075    } // setExit()
076
077    /**
078     * Formats all exit directions as a single line.
079     *
080     * @return text like {@code Exits: north east}
081     */
082    public String getExitString()
083    {
084        StringBuilder vReturnString = new StringBuilder( "Exits:" );
085        for ( String vExit : this.aExits.keySet() ) {
086            vReturnString.append( " " ).append( vExit );
087        }
088        return vReturnString.toString();
089    } // getExitString()
090
091    /**
092     * Returns the image resource path associated with this room.
093     *
094     * @return classpath-relative image filename, or {@code null}
095     */
096    public String getImageName()
097    {
098        return this.aImageName;
099    } // getImageName()
100
101    /**
102     * Retrieves an item currently stored in the room.
103     *
104     * @param pName lookup key used when the item was {@link #addItem(String, Item) added}
105     * @return the matching {@link Item}, or {@code null}
106     */
107    public Item getItem( final String pName )
108    {
109        return this.aItems.getItem( pName );
110    }
111
112    /**
113     * Places (or replaces) an item in this room under the given key.
114     *
115     * @param pName short identifier used for later retrieval
116     * @param pItem the {@link Item} instance to store
117     */
118    public void addItem( final String pName, final Item pItem )
119    {
120        this.aItems.addItem( pName, pItem );
121    }
122
123    /**
124     * Removes an item from this room's item list.
125     *
126     * @param pName lookup key of the item to remove
127     */
128    public void removeItem( final String pName )
129    {
130        this.aItems.removeItem( pName );
131    }
132
133} // Room
